title: Hiding sub items from a filtered view or shared board
excerpt: There was a recent upgrade that no longer allows me to hide my sub items on filtered views that I share with clients. How can this be corrected?

posts.author: CindyDAlonzo (Cindy DAlonzo)
posts.cookedHtml: There was a recent upgrade that no longer allows me to hide my sub items on filtered views that I share with clients. How can this be corrected?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @CindyDAlonzo! I am afraid with our upgraded layout it isn’t currently possible to hide subitems in board views. If you can please add your vote here, Hide Subitem Columns and save as a new View this way we can boost votes and visibility to get this feature on our developers radar

posts.author: dkolotauri1 (Dimitri)
posts.cookedHtml: That is so sad that you have not yet fixed the this issue, that is so sad!
